ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of confirmed cases in the state */,
  "total_cured" INTEGER /* Total number of cured cases in the state */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths in the state */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the state data */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "covid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each COVID-19 data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state to which the data belongs */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases */,
  "cured" INTEGER /* Number of cured cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the state */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the state */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "recovery_rate" REAL /* Recovery rate */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Mortality rate */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "vaccinated_population" INTEGER /* Number of vaccinated individuals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("covid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state to which the city belongs */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of confirmed cases in the city */,
  "total_cured" INTEGER /* Total number of cured cases in the city */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths in the city */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the city data */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate in the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state to which the district belongs */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the district in square kilometers */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of confirmed cases in the district */,
  "total_cured" INTEGER /* Total number of cured cases in the district */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths in the district */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the district data */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, healthcare professional) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "covid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the COVID-19 data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_covid_id FOREIGN KEY ("covid_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("covid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "covid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the COVID-19 data to which the prediction belongs */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Predicted number of confirmed cases */,
  "cured" INTEGER /* Predicted number of cured cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Predicted number of deaths */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model making the prediction */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_covid_id FOREIGN KEY ("covid_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("covid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES Machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "Machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "last_trained_date" TEXT /* Last date the model was trained */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* Data source used for training the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "model_prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model making the prediction */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction */,
  "prediction_status" TEXT /* Status of the prediction (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the model prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES Machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government report, health agency) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the data source */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_covid_data" (
  "source_covid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source-COVID-19 data link */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "covid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the COVID-19 data */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data from the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_covid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_covid_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_covid_data_covid_id FOREIGN KEY ("covid_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("covid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "covid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the COVID-19 data triggering the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new data, update, alert) */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_covid_id FOREIGN KEY ("covid_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("covid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "covid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the COVID-19 data used in the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_covid_id FOREIGN KEY ("covid_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("covid_id")
)
